title: laphamia coronopifolia
intro: Laphamia coronopifolia, also known as Cuatillo or Cuatillo de la tierra, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Laphamia coronopifolia include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
